meta.title: Florian AUTHELIN | Portfolio
meta.description: Win98-themed portfolio of Florian AUTHELIN: web projects, contact/appointment and resume.
btn.desktopLabShortcut: Open Laboratory in a new tab
btn.desktopAppointmentShortcut: Book an appointment in a new tab
btn.desktopResumeShortcut: Open resume in a new tab
p.homeDisclaimer: Disclaimer: This website is a personal portfolio created solely to showcase my development skills. It is not intended for commercial use. If you have any questions or concerns regarding intellectual property or other matters, please contact me via GitHub, LinkedIn, or email.
p.homeTextIntro: My name is Florian AUTHELIN and this is my Win98 inspired portfolio.
p.homeTextTutorial: To give you a quick explanation of how this works, there is a desktop in the background with different icons. Clicking an icon will open a window or redirect you to the corresponding page
span.homeTextHelp.before: I'll show this only once, but you can always come back to this help menu by clicking the small yellow question mark located
p.homeTextContact: If you wish to contact me, you can send me a message by clicking on the Contact icon on the desktop or in the start menu and fill out the form. If you prefer to book a call, you can do so by clicking on the Appointment icon. It'll redirect you to a Google Calendar page.
p.contactText: If you wish to send me a message, please fill the form below.
p.introProjects: This is a list of all my personal projects. By clicking on the screen, it will redirect you to the corresponding page.
h2.helpHeading: Welcome to Mr. AUTHELIN Florian's portfolio!
h3.helpHeading: How to navigate on this website?
p.helpAbout: This website aims to function like an Operating System, there will be features like resizing, minimizing, and maximizing windows!
td.homeIcon: This is the Home icon. It allows you to go back on the main page.
td.projectsIcon: This is the Projects icon. It contains a presentation of all of my projects.
td.labIcon: This is the Laboratory icon. It redirects to my Three.js experiments
td.contactIcon: This is the Contact icon. It has a contact form that you can use to send a message to Mr. AUTHELIN Florian.
td.appointmentIcon: This is the Appointment icon. It redirects to a Google Calendar to book a call with Mr. AUTHELIN Florian.
td.resumeIcon: This is the Resume icon. It redirects to the resume page of Mr. AUTHELIN Florian.
td.languageIcon: This is the Language icon. You can switch between English, French and Japanese.
span.helpText.before: I'll show only one time but you can always go back on this help menu by clicking on the little yellow interrogation mark situated
p.alertTextTablet1: You're viewing this website on a medium-sized screen. For a better experience, please use a larger device.
p.alertTextTablet2: To navigate this website, please close the current window before opening another one. You can't open two windows at the same time.
p.messageWIP: The mobile version is still under development, please come back later!
